ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division or league of the match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Home team */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Home team's score */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Away team's score */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., home, away, draw) */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., league, cup, friendly) */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "half_time_result" TEXT /* Result at half-time */,
  "match_version" TEXT /* Version of the match data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team FOREIGN KEY ("home_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_division FOREIGN KEY ("division") REFERENCES leagues ("league_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team FOREIGN KEY ("away_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Name of the current manager */,
  "home_stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_version" TEXT /* Version of the team data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the league was founded */,
  "league_version" TEXT /* Version of the league data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "betting_odds" (
  "odds_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each betting odds record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "bookmaker" TEXT /* Bookmaker */,
  "home_odds" REAL /* Odds of the home team winning */,
  "draw_odds" REAL /* Odds of a draw */,
  "away_odds" REAL /* Odds of the away team winning */,
  "odds_date" TEXT /* Date when the odds were set */,
  "odds_version" TEXT /* Version of the odds data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("odds_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_odds_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match statistics record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "home_shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the home team */,
  "away_shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the away team */,
  "home_corners" INTEGER /* Number of corners taken by the home team */,
  "away_corners" INTEGER /* Number of corners taken by the away team */,
  "home_possession" REAL /* Percentage of possession for the home team */,
  "away_possession" REAL /* Percentage of possession for the away team */,
  "home_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the home team */,
  "away_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the away team */,
  "home_yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards for the home team */,
  "away_yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards for the away team */,
  "home_red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards for the home team */,
  "away_red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards for the away team */,
  "stat_version" TEXT /* Version of the statistics data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, data scientist, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "user_version" TEXT /* Version of the user data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "log_version" TEXT /* Version of the log data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
